Aircraft.name: 0_demo_plane

Setter.function: smooth(((0.25 + (0.75 * inverselerp((9 + 1), (9 - 1), VerticalG))) - (0.75 * inverselerp((-3 + 1), (-3 - 1), VerticalG))), (0.2 + (0.1 * inverselerp(9, (9 + 2), VerticalG))))
(((!engine_on ? 0.0 : clamp((-clamp(PitchRate, -180, 180) * (0.01 + (0.005 * inverselerp(400, 200, IAS)))), -1, 1)) * control_limiter) * inverselerp(2, 5, abs(PitchRate)))

((smooth(((0.2 * clamp01((Time > 0.5))) * clamp(PID(clamp(((PitchAngle + AOA) - clamp01((0.2 - rate(Altitude)))), -1, 1), PitchRate, 2, 0, 0.2), -1, 1)), ((((0.03 * inverselerp(40, 15, abs(PitchAngle))) * inverselerp(35, 15, abs(RollAngle))) * inverselerp(20, 10, (abs(PitchRate) + abs(RollRate)))) * inverselerp(0.3, 0.1, (abs(Pitch) + abs(Roll))))) * (((inverselerp(1, 0, abs(Pitch)) * inverselerp(20, 50, IAS)) * inverselerp(90, 60, abs(RollAngle))) * clamp01((1 - (2 * abs(Trim)))))) + (0.3 * Trim))
(clamp((((((30 + (30 * clamp01(-Activate8))) - (10 * clamp01((abs(smooth(Roll, 2)) * 2)))) * smooth(clamp(Pitch, -1, 0), 1)) - AOA) * 0.02), 0, 0.5) * inverselerp(30, 80, IAS))

((((((pitch_control * ((pitch_control < 0) ? 0.5 : (0.1 + (0.9 * inverselerp(80, 30, IAS))))) * (inverselerp((30 + (40 * clamp01(-Activate8))), 10, abs(AOA)) + 1)) + AOA_feed) - (AOA / 45)) + (((-rate(AOA) * 0.01) * inverselerp(200, 100, IAS)) * clamp01(-Activate8))) + autotrim)

Aircraft.Instructions:
PYtoFT demo plane by Whills
YouTube.com/@whillsbp
AG1: Canopy AG2: Airbrake AG3: Tailhook AG4: Lights AG5: N/A AG6: N/A AG7: Jettison Weapons AG8: AOA Limiter
